prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约20081、25296、21021、21039、22450名，整体呈波动走势。2021-2022年位次大幅后移约5200名，2023-2024年回升至约21000名附近，2025年又后移至22450名，近3年累计后移约1400名，呈缓慢后移趋势；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划持续扩增：2021年97人、2022年104人、2023年109人、2024年116人、2025年120人，2026年计划133人，较2025年扩招13人（+10.8%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名，近年排名稳定在48-62区间，属于中上水平211；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档事件；抖音平台热度一般，未进入总排名前100，社会关注度中等偏下，报考心理无明显异常信号；该校以石油石化特色著称，石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势学科（第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校A-及以上学科），行业认可度高；招生专业涵盖石油工程、化工、机械、计算机、自动化等方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度较高（高热推荐），但该校核心的石油工程、化工、地质类专业属于传统工科，社会热度偏低（生化环材类明显劝退）；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年约90.7万大幅增长约32%），物理类考生估算约73.4万，竞争显著加剧；学校位于北京市，对河南考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比相对较高（2025年物理类120人），属于在京211中在豫招生规模较大的院校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次缓慢后移趋势、2026年扩招10.8%的缓解效应与河南省考生总量大幅增长约32%带来的竞争加剧，考生增量主导了竞争格局变化，预计2026年最低位次较2025年基准22450名进一步后移（更难进），但扩招部分抵消了后移幅度；预测最低位次约23509名，区间23009-24009名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 20081, 25296, 21021, 21039, and 22450, showing a fluctuating trend. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking dropped significantly by about 5200 places, then rebounded to around 21000 in 2023-2024, and further dropped to 22450 in 2025, with a cumulative drop of about 1400 places over the past 3 years, indicating a slow downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Henan Province has been continuously expanding: 97 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 116 in 2024, 120 in 2025, and a planned 133 in 2026, an increase of 13 students (+10.8%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately ranked 62nd, with recent rankings stable in the 48-62 range, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. On Douyin platform, its popularity is moderate, not entering the top 100 overall, indicating below-average social attention and no abnormal signals in application psychology. The university is renowned for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous disciplines (the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include A- or above disciplines for this university), and high industry recognition. The enrollment majors include petroleum engineering, chemical engineering, mechanical engineering, computer science, automation, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering have high social popularity (highly recommended), but the university's core majors like petroleum engineering, chemical engineering, and geology are traditional engineering fields with lower social popularity (fields like biology, chemistry, environment, materials are clearly discouraged). In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category candidates, leading to intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Henan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan is relatively high (120 Physics Category students in 2025), making it one of the larger-scale enrolling universities among 211 universities in Beijing for Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow downward trend in historical rankings, the mitigating effect of a 10.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, the increase in candidates dominates the competitive landscape. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further drop (harder to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline of 22450, but the expansion partially offsets the drop. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23509, with a range of 23009-24009.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23009-24009, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Petroleum Engineering, New Energy, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Environmental Science, Materials Science, Geology, Business Administration) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 23009), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence. If the ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 24009), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 core majors with Tier 3 as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 4672, 3958, 3681, 4526, and 3645 respectively, showing a fluctuating but overall forward trend. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking moved forward from 4672 to 3681 (forward by about 990 places), retreated to 4526 in 2024, and then moved forward to 3645 in 2025, with a cumulative forward movement of about 1030 places in the last 3 years, fluctuating but generally trending forward. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province has been continuously shrinking: 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 7 in 2025, and only 5 planned for 2026, a reduction of 2 places (-28.6%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 62nd, with recent rankings stable in the 48-62 range. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment interruption incidents. Its Douyin popularity is average, not entering the top 100 overall. The university is strong in science and engineering, while its liberal arts majors (Ideological and Political Education, English) are not its strengths, and no related liberal arts A-class disciplines are included in the discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Ideological and Political Education major is stable, while the English major has average social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude (foreign language majors have relatively low popularity). In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, with an estimated 466,000 history category examinees (an increase of about 32% from approximately 352,000 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which still has a certain regional appeal to Henan liberal arts examinees. However, the liberal arts enrollment plan is only 5 places, extremely small, and ranking fluctuations may be large.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical forward trend in rankings, the significant 28.6% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the double competitive pressure from an approximately 32% increase in the total number of examinees in Henan Province, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move further forward (harder to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline of 3645. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2940, with a range of 2440-3440.
